meaning: n.小器具,小配件,小玩意,诡计
examples: This gadget is just the thing for getting those nails out.
Roughly the size of a soda can, sitting on a bookshelf, a relatively harmless gadget may be turning friends away from your home.
The gadget can grill, bake, fry, defrost and steam using a halogen light as heat.
For every interesting gadget or prototype, there were dozens of small booths hawking digital detritus.
